notableEvents.label: Jake McCarthy GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jake McCarthy grounds into a double play, second baseman Brice Turang to shortstop Joey Ortiz to first baseman Andrew Vaughn. Kyle Karros out at 2nd. Jake McCarthy out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Edouard Julien pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Gary Sánchez challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Edouard Julien called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Sterlin Thompson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Sterlin Thompson grounds out, second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Andrew Vaughn.

notableEvents.label: Ezequiel Tovar GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ezequiel Tovar grounds into a double play, third baseman Luis Rengifo to second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Andrew Vaughn. Willi Castro out at 2nd. Ezequiel Tovar out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: William Contreras GIDP
notableEvents.detail: William Contreras grounds into a double play, third baseman Kyle Karros to second baseman Chad Stevens to first baseman TJ Rumfield. Jackson Chourio out at 2nd. William Contreras out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Sal Frelick pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Sal Frelick pops out to third baseman Kyle Karros in foul territory.

notableEvents.label: Sal Frelick pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Sal Frelick grounds out, first baseman TJ Rumfield to pitcher Keegan Thompson.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
